mnemonics: S.P.E.C.: Strategy, Process, Execution, Compliance - the four pillars of IT procurement.
keyPoints: Accurately forecast demand to avoid over-procurement or under-procurement.
Establish a formal vendor evaluation and selection process based on criteria like cost, reliability, and support.
Ensure all procurement activities adhere to organizational policies and relevant legal/regulatory requirements.
commonMistakes: Failing to plan for the total cost of ownership (TCO), focusing only on the initial purchase price.
Neglecting to establish clear Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with vendors, leading to unmet expectations.
